Title: Testing Schermata inziale activity
Test Steps:
1. Verify that the initial screen is displayed
2. Verify that the user can select a state, region, and city
3. Verify that the user can select their current position
4. Verify that the user can request data from the server
5. Verify that the data is presented correctly
Expected Result: The user should be able to interact with the initial screen, select their location, request data from the server, and view the data correctly.

Title: Testing Schermata inziale activity with invalid data
Test Steps:
1. Verify that the user can select an invalid state, region, or city
2. Verify that the user can select an invalid current position
3. Verify that an exception is thrown or the app behaves correctly
Expected Result: The app should handle invalid selections gracefully, either by throwing an exception or by displaying an error message.

Title: Testing Mappa activity
Preconditions: The user has selected a location and requested data
Test Steps:
1. Verify that the map is displayed
2. Verify that the user can scroll down to update data
3. Verify that the updated map is displayed
Expected Result: The user should be able to view the map, scroll down to update data, and view the updated map.

Title: Testing Mappa activity with invalid data
Preconditions: The user has selected a location and requested data
Test Steps:
1. Verify that the user can scroll down to update data with invalid data
2. Verify that an exception is thrown or the app behaves correctly
Expected Result: The app should handle invalid data gracefully, either by throwing an exception or by displaying an error message.

Title: Testing Suggerimenti activity
Preconditions: The user has pressed the suggestion button

Expected Result: The user should be able to interact with the suggestion screen.

Title: Testing AirQualityActivity activity
Test Steps:
1. Verify that the countries, states, regions, and cities are loaded correctly
2. Verify that the user can select a country, state, region, and city
3. Verify that the data is retrieved from the server correctly
4. Verify that the data is presented correctly
Expected Result: The user should be able to select a location and view the data correctly.

Title: Testing AirQualityActivity activity with invalid data
Test Steps:
1. Verify that the user can select an invalid location
2. Verify that an exception is thrown or the app behaves correctly
Expected Result: The app should handle invalid selections gracefully, either by throwing an exception or by displaying an error message.
